message:
feat(core,render,runtime,tty): harden mouse protocol ordering, pixel coord sanitization, metric invalidation tracking, and resize evidence

Mouse protocol compatibility (core, tty, render):
- Reorder DECSET sequences to set SGR format (1006) before enabling
  mouse event modes (1000, 1002) for better compatibility with
  terminals that key off "last mode set" ordering.
- Expand mux-safe mouse enable/disable sequences to reset all legacy
  and alternate mouse encodings (1001, 1003, 1005, 1015, 1016),
  preventing inner terminals from getting "stuck" in formats the
  parser cannot decode.
- Update BackendFeatures doc comment to include 1003 in the mouse
  capture mode list.
- Update ANSI constant tests to match new sequence ordering.
- Update terminal_session tests for the expanded mux-safe sequences.

Pixel coordinate sanitization (core):
- Add sanitize_crossterm_mouse_coords() to detect when crossterm
  leaks 1016-style pixel coordinates instead of cell coordinates.
  Uses conservative thresholds (512 for x, 256 for y) and falls
  back to dividing by default cell pixel dimensions (8x16).
- Add tests for both pixel-coordinate sanitization and passthrough.

Metric invalidation lifecycle (render/fit_metrics):
- Add MetricInvalidation::bit() bitmask and ordered_pending_from_mask()
  for deterministic, canonical-order pending invalidation tracking.
- Track pending_invalidation_mask in MetricLifecycle, accumulating
  reasons across coalesced invalidation bursts.
- Enhance set_viewport() to detect DPR, zoom, and size changes
  independently and set appropriate invalidation reason bits.
- Add last_invalidation() and pending_invalidations() accessors.
- Extend MetricSnapshot with pending_invalidation_mask and count.
- Clear mask on refit(). Add comprehensive tests for canonical
  ordering, DPR/zoom detection, delayed font loads, font swap
  races, and dynamic event stream sequencing.

Resize coalescer evidence (runtime):
- Add TransitionReasonCode enum with structured string forms for
  JSONL evidence (heuristic_enter_burst_rate, heuristic_exit_burst_cooldown,
  bocpd_posterior_burst, bocpd_posterior_steady).
- Add RegimeTransitionLog struct with full transition evidence
  (reason_code, confidence, event_rate, p_burst, cooldown).
- Attach transition_reason_code and transition_confidence to
  DecisionLog entries for correlated evidence.
- Include transition evidence in JSONL export and determinism hash.

TTY input tracing (tty):
- Add optional debug input tracing via FTUI_TTY_INPUT_TRACE env var.
  When set to a file path, raw input bytes and parsed events are
  appended in a human-readable format for debugging terminal
  compatibility issues.
- Use BufWriter for the trace file to minimize syscall overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
